'SELECT portfolios_pg.id AS portfolios_pg_id, portfolios_pg.name AS portfolios_pg_name, portfolios_pg.description AS portfolios_pg_description, portfolios_pg.org_id AS portfolios_pg_org_id, portfolios_pg.created_at AS portfolios_pg_created_at, portfolios_pg.updated_at AS portfolios_pg_updated_at FROM portfolios_pg WHERE portfolios_pg.id = %(id_1)s LIMIT %(param_1)s'
